parts.text:
"Benchmark task: feature-add-small
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Add title-case support to bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs using the existing mode-based pattern. Read bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs and bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs first. Do not add dependencies. Verify with node --test bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
I need to read the two files mentioned (formatTitle.mjs and formatTitle.test.mjs) to understand the existing pattern and structure before making any changes to add title-case support.

metadata.preview:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

display.text:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

state.title: bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs

parts.text: Now I understand the existing formatTitle.mjs structure with mode-based pattern (supporting 'upper', 'lower', and 'plain' modes). I need to add title-case support following the same pattern - I'll add a case for 'title' mode that converts words to title case. I should edit the file to add this new mode.
